name: agent-skill-hub
description: Portable skills for vibe coding, agent implementation, design engineering, and Langflow integration.

skills.title: Karpathy Guidelines
skills.description: Behavioral coding guidance that favors explicit assumptions, simple implementations, surgical changes, and verifiable outcomes.

langflow.reason: These behavioral constraints should apply before the agent decides whether to call a tool.

skills.title: Flint Chart Author
skills.description: Authors semantic Flint chart specifications and guides agents through validation, rendering, and JS/TS integration.

langflow.reason: Use the Skill as authoring guidance and approved internal Flint MCP for executable validation and rendering.

skills.title: Hallmark
skills.description: Anti-AI-slop design workflow for greenfield pages, audits, redesigns, and design-DNA studies.

langflow.reason: Hallmark is a multi-step design workflow with extensive progressive-disclosure references, not a single prompt or tool call.

skills.title: Animation Vocabulary
skills.description: Maps vague descriptions of web motion effects to precise animation terminology.

langflow.reason: This is compact reference knowledge with no external action or state.

skills.title: Apple Design
skills.description: Applies fluid, physical, interruptible Apple-style interaction and motion principles to web interfaces.

langflow.reason: Use as specialist design context when a flow is building or reviewing gesture and motion behavior.

skills.title: Emil Design Engineering
skills.description: Design-engineering guidance for UI polish, component craft, animation decisions, and interaction details.

langflow.reason: Use as on-demand design-engineering context rather than an always-on global system prompt.

skills.title: Find Animation Opportunities
skills.description: Finds high-value places to add motion while explicitly rejecting unnecessary animation.

langflow.reason: The workflow inspects a codebase, filters candidates, and returns structured findings without modifying source.

skills.title: Improve Animations
skills.description: Audits a codebase's motion system and writes prioritized, self-contained implementation plans without changing source code.

langflow.reason: This is a stateful audit-to-plan workflow with supporting standards and plan templates.

skills.title: Review Animations
skills.description: Reviews animation code against a high craft, performance, physicality, and accessibility bar.

langflow.reason: This explicit review workflow needs diff context, standards, structured findings, and an approval verdict.
